title: Fulbright Scholar Opportunities — Seminar Slides (DeVirgilis)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2024-02-29 New Faculty Development Seminar 'Fulbright Scholar Opportunities' presented by Megan DeVirgilis, PhD (MSU World Languages and International Studies). Covers Fulbright Scholar program eligibility, application timeline, and tips for MSU faculty pursuing international research/teaching exchanges. Part of the 2024-02-29 Society Fellowships and Other Honors panel.
